key_insights.insight: Small teams have infinite leverage with technology.

contrarian_claims: Abundance isn't always a great thing, and that comes with a lot of free time and a crisis of meaning.
The most successful AI is the one that plays with the dopamine and makes you think you're achieving something when you're just consuming.
